top3.sql:
SELECT p.ID, l."T-CHO"
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l."T-CHO" = (
    SELECT MAX("T-CHO")
    FROM Laboratory
)
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.ID, l."T-CHO"
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC, l."T-CHO" DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.ID, l."T-CHO"
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l."T-CHO" = (
    SELECT MAX("T-CHO")
    FROM Laboratory
)
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.ID, l."T-CHO"
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC, l."T-CHO" DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.ID, l."T-CHO"
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Birthday = (SELECT MIN(Birthday) FROM Patient)
ORDER BY l."T-CHO" DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.ID, l."T-CHO"
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l."T-CHO" = (
    SELECT MAX("T-CHO")
    FROM Laboratory
)
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.ID, l."T-CHO"
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l."T-CHO" = (
    SELECT MAX("T-CHO")
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE "T-CHO" IS NOT NULL
)
AND p.Birthday = (
    SELECT MIN(Birthday)
    FROM Patient
    WHERE ID IN (
        SELECT ID
        FROM Laboratory
        WHERE "T-CHO" = (
            SELECT MAX("T-CHO")
            FROM Laboratory
            WHERE "T-CHO" IS NOT NULL
        )
    )
)
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.ID, l."T-CHO"
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC, l."T-CHO" DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT p.ID, l."T-CHO"
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l."T-CHO" = (
    SELECT MAX("T-CHO")
    FROM Laboratory
)
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;
